2604.19406.title: HP-Edit: A Human-Preference Post-Training Framework for Image Editing
2604.19406.paper_summary: Common image editing tasks typically adopt powerful generative diffusion models as the leading paradigm for real-world content editing. Meanwhile, although reinforcement learning (RL) methods such as Diffusion-DPO and Flow-GRPO have further improved generation quality, efficiently applying Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) to diffusion-based editing remains largely unexplored, due to a lack of scalable human-preference datasets and frameworks tailored to diverse editing needs. To fill this gap, we propose HP-Edit, a post-training framework for Human Preference-aligned Editing, and introduce RealPref-50K, a real-world dataset across eight common tasks and balancing common object editing. Specifically, HP-Edit leverages a small amount of human-preference scoring data and a pretrained visual large language model (VLM) to develop HP-Scorer--an automatic, human preference-aligned evaluator. We then use HP-Scorer both to efficiently build a scalable preference dataset and to serve as the reward function for post-training the editing model. We also introduce RealPref-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating real-world editing performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances models such as Qwen-Image-Edit-2509, aligning their outputs more closely with human preference.
2604.19406.paper_summary_zh: 常見的圖像編輯任務通常採用強大的生成擴散模型作為現實內容編輯的主要範式。<lb/>同時，儘管強化學習（RL）方法如Diffusion-DPO和Flow-GRPO進一步提高了生成質量，但由於缺乏可擴展的人類偏好數據集和針對多樣化編輯需求量身定制的框架，將人類反饋的強化學習（RLHF）有效應用於基於擴散的編輯仍然在很大程度上未被探索。<lb/>為填補這一空白，我們提出了HP-Edit，一個針對人類偏好對齊編輯的後訓練框架，並介紹了RealPref-50K，一個涵蓋八個常見任務的現實世界數據集，並平衡常見物體編輯。<lb/>具體而言，HP-Edit利用少量的人類偏好評分數據和一個預訓練的視覺大型語言模型（VLM）來開發HP-Scorer——一個自動化的人類偏好對齊評估器。<lb/>然後，我們使用HP-Scorer來有效地構建可擴展的偏好數據集，並作為後訓練編輯模型的獎勵函數。<lb/>我們還介紹了RealPref-Bench，一個用於評估現實世界編輯性能的基準。<lb/>大量實驗表明，我們的方法顯著提升了如Qwen-Image-Edit-2509等模型，使其輸出與人類偏好更為一致。
2604.19406.author: Fan Li et.al.
2604.19406.authors: Fan Li, Chonghuinan Wang, Lina Lei, Yuping Qiu, Jiaqi Xu, Jiaxiu Jiang, Xinran Qin, Zhikai Chen, Fenglong Song, Zhixin Wang, Renjing Pei, Wangmeng Zuo
